sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114241" key="xnauro/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χναυρός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ά</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n114241.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dainty,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πλευρὰ δελφάκει᾽ . . χναυρότατα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:108:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">108.17</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
